Class Pager

java.lang.Object
store.Pager
public class Pager extends Object
It implements the store's pager, used for dividing big lists into small sub-lists of a desired size (lines-wise), helpful when browsing (check main)
See Also:
  • Review
  • StoreProduct
  • RegisteredClient
  • Employee
  • Pack
  • Discount
  • Category

      public void printReviewListPage(List<Review> reviewList, int pageNum)
      It prints a sub-list of another according to the desired page
      Parameters:
      reviewList - the list of reviews
      pageNum - the desired page's number
